entry.title: ScanGov data supports judging for 2025 Government Experience Awards
entry.summary: Provided quantitative website scan data to e.Republic’s Center for Digital Government annual awards program.

entry.title: First Contentful Paint (FCP) + Largest Contentful Paint (LCP) demo
entry.summary: ScanGov demos how we conduct performance audits related to First Contentful Paint (FCP) and Largest Contentful Paint (LCP).

entry.title: Time to First Byte (TTFB) demo
entry.summary: ScanGov demos how we conduct performance audits related to Time to First Byte.

entry.title: Standards for government digital experience
entry.summary: Building a community approach that holistically delivers for the people.

entry.title: Government digital experience map
entry.summary: ScanGov map shows how U.S. states fare on government digital experience standards.

entry.title: ScanGov to support judging for 2025 Government Experience Awards
entry.summary: Will provide holistic, quantitative website scan data to e.Republic’s Center for Digital Government annual GovX awards program.

entry.title: New ScanGov government website security report cards
entry.summary: Scans include content security policy, HSTS, X-Content-Type-Options, security.txt.

entry.title: ScanGov supports judging for 2024 Government Experience Awards
entry.summary: Provided quantitative website scan data to e.Republic’s Center for Digital Government annual awards program.
